name: aberdeen-1996-blyths-ren-architecture-prescription-it-success
title: Blyth's REN Architecture: A Prescription for IT Success
description: Aberdeen Group evaluates Blyth Software's REN architecture targeting both traditional client-server and Internet/Intranet electronic commerce applications. Features analysis of Web Enabler, OMNIS Data Server, Web Vault, Web Manager, and Weblets products.
